_meta.purpose: Backfill suitability_data for DB products that didn't auto-match a PRH-1009 entry via family-slug. Each override either borrows a closest-cousin entry from product-suitability.json or inlines a conservative entry for true accessories. Marked with _overrideSource so audits can distinguish backfilled rows from native PDF matches.
_meta.ownerNote: Conservative interpretation: when in doubt, default to Pedestrians + Pedestrian-segregation/Removable-Barrier. Accessories that aren't impact products carry impactZone=null.

overrides.comment: Re-activated heavy-duty bollard SKU. Spec sheet for the iFlex HD Bollard is the authoritative cousin: same 190mm OD post, same vehicle suitability list. Catalog PDF page 36.
Standard 190mm polymer bollard in yellow. Mechanically identical to Monoplex 190 (price-list rev confirms 190mm OD).
Standard 190mm polymer bollard in grey. Same body as Monoplex 190 — colour only differs.
Spacer set is a fitting accessory for the FlexiShield Column Guard system; inherits the host product's suitability envelope.

overrides.dbProductName: Flex - Retractable Barrier (Belt Barrier) - Post to Post - YEL/BLK
overrides.comment: Post-to-post variant of the same belt-barrier family. Catalog PRH-1009 page 35.

overrides.dbProductName: Retractable Barrier - Racking Maintenance Case - YEL/BLK
overrides.comment: Same retractable-belt mechanism, packaged as a maintenance kit. Suitability envelope is the same.
Single SKU member of the Slider Base Plates family. Same Removable-Barrier suitability.
Top-tier 20kJ traffic barrier (T2 = highest impact, P0 = no pedestrian rail). Heaviest-class FLT suitability per the iFlex Double Traffic Barrier+ PRH-1009 entry.
13.4kJ traffic barrier without pedestrian rail. Maps cleanly onto iFlex Double Traffic Barrier suitability per PRH-1009 page 13.
19.2kJ pedestrian + traffic combined (P1 = single ped rail). iFlex Single Traffic+ is the closest catalog cousin (same Traffic and pedestrian segregation use-case).
Pedestrian-rated 15kJ variant with full 3-rail (P2). iFlex Pedestrian Barrier 3 Rail is the catalog cousin.
Lightweight 5.8kJ pedestrian barrier (130mm post). Pedestrian-segregation suitability.

atexSuitability.note: Not suitable in an explosive atmosphere

inline.impactZoneNote: Cap-style impact softener — fitted over an existing bollard host; not an impact-rated barrier in its own right.

overrides.comment: Cap-style cushion accessory that fits over an existing bollard. Not an impact product on its own — minimal conservative envelope only.

atexSuitability.note: Not suitable in an explosive atmosphere

inline.impactZoneNote: Self-closing hydraulic swing gate — pedestrian-rated, not an impact product.

overrides.comment: Mezzanine / stair-landing pedestrian gate. iFlex Swing Gate Long/Short PRH-1009 entry uses the same 'These gates are not impact products' note.

overrides.dbProductName: Tape Barrier Kit - Wall to Wall - YEL/BLK

inline.productName: Tape Barrier Kit - Wall to Wall - YEL/BLK

atexSuitability.note: Not suitable in an explosive atmosphere

inline.impactZoneNote: Wall-to-wall retractable tape kit — temporary cordoning; not an impact product.

overrides.comment: Wall-mounted retractable tape — typically used internally for temporary cordoning. Not impact rated; pedestrian-only.
